languages.text: "{name} фон Валанциус, что сош{mf|ел|ла} со звезд, сейчас перед нами! Сражается за право командовать меровским 32-м!" {n}Голос Ведки разносится над людьми.{/n} "Скажите, Ваша Светлость, зачем мы вам?!"

"{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"
languages.original_text: "{name} фон Валанциус, что сош{mf|ел|ла} со звезд, сейчас перед нами! Сражается за право командовать меровским 32-м!" {n}Голос Ведки разносится над людьми.{/n} "Скажите, Ваша Светлость, зачем мы вам?!"

traits.locale_text: "{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"

"{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"

"{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"

"{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"

"{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"

languages.text: “这位自星海降临的{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，此刻正立于我们面前，为争夺梅罗夫第32团的指挥权而战！”{n}薇德卡的声音在人群中回荡。{/n}“请告诉我们，大人，我们对您有何价值？”
languages.original_text: "{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"

traits.locale_text: “这位自星海降临的{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，此刻正立于我们面前，为争夺梅罗夫第32团的指挥权而战！”{n}薇德卡的声音在人群中回荡。{/n}“请告诉我们，大人，我们对您有何价值？”

languages.text: "Yıldızlardan inen {name} von Valancius, şu an karşımızda duruyor! 32. Merov Alayı'nı komuta etme hakkı için savaşıyor!" {n}Vedka'nın sesi, kalabalığın üzerinde çınlıyor.{/n} "Söyleyin bize {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, bizimle ne yapacaksınız?"
languages.original_text: "{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"

traits.locale_text: "Yıldızlardan inen {name} von Valancius, şu an karşımızda duruyor! 32. Merov Alayı'nı komuta etme hakkı için savaşıyor!" {n}Vedka'nın sesi, kalabalığın üzerinde çınlıyor.{/n} "Söyleyin bize {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, bizimle ne yapacaksınız?"

languages.text: « {name} von Valancius est {mf|descendu|descendue} du ciel étoilé pour se tenir face à nous ! {mf|Il|Elle} se bat pour l'honneur de commander le 32e régiment de Merov ! {n}laisse éclater Vedka au milieu de la foule.{/n} Dites-nous, Votre Seigneurie. Que comptez-vous faire de nous ? »
languages.original_text: "{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"

traits.locale_text: « {name} von Valancius est {mf|descendu|descendue} du ciel étoilé pour se tenir face à nous ! {mf|Il|Elle} se bat pour l'honneur de commander le 32e régiment de Merov ! {n}laisse éclater Vedka au milieu de la foule.{/n} Dites-nous, Votre Seigneurie. Que comptez-vous faire de nous ? »

languages.text: «¡{name} von Valancius, que ha descendido de entre las estrellas, se encuentra ahora frente a nosotros! ¡Luchando por el derecho de dirigir el 32.º regimiento de Merov!». {n}La voz de Vedka resuena sobre el ruido de la multitud.{/n} «Díganos, mi{mf|lord|lady}, ¿qué uso tiene en mente para nosotros?».
languages.original_text: "{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"

traits.locale_text: «¡{name} von Valancius, que ha descendido de entre las estrellas, se encuentra ahora frente a nosotros! ¡Luchando por el derecho de dirigir el 32.º regimiento de Merov!». {n}La voz de Vedka resuena sobre el ruido de la multitud.{/n} «Díganos, mi{mf|lord|lady}, ¿qué uso tiene en mente para nosotros?».

languages.text: "{name} von Valancius, {mf|der|die} von den Sternen kam, steht nun vor uns! {mf|Er|Sie} kämpft um das Recht, das 32. Merrov-Regiment befehligen zu dürfen!" {n}Vedkas Stimme übertönt die Menge.{/n} "Sagt uns, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, welche Verwendung habt Ihr für uns?"
languages.original_text: "{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"

traits.locale_text: "{name} von Valancius, {mf|der|die} von den Sternen kam, steht nun vor uns! {mf|Er|Sie} kämpft um das Recht, das 32. Merrov-Regiment befehligen zu dürfen!" {n}Vedkas Stimme übertönt die Menge.{/n} "Sagt uns, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, welche Verwendung habt Ihr für uns?"

languages.text: 「星から降りてきたヴァランシウス家の{name}が、我々の前に立っている！32番メローヴ連隊の指揮権を争うために！」{n}ヴェドカの声が、人々の間を響き渡る。{/n}「我々をどう使うつもりか、閣下は！」
languages.original_text: "{name} von Valancius, who descended from the stars, stands before us now! Fighting for the right to command the 32nd Merov Regiment!" {n}Vedka's voice rings out over the crowd.{/n} "Tell us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what use have you for us?"

traits.locale_text: 「星から降りてきたヴァランシウス家の{name}が、我々の前に立っている！32番メローヴ連隊の指揮権を争うために！」{n}ヴェドカの声が、人々の間を響き渡る。{/n}「我々をどう使うつもりか、閣下は！」
